ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio that produced the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Length of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R, PG) */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the studio */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the studio */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the studio */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the studio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being released */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "revenue_stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revenue stream for the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_revenue_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("revenue_stream_id") REFERENCES revenue_streams ("revenue_stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES movie_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold */,
  "domestic_revenue" TEXT /* Domestic revenue */,
  "international_revenue" TEXT /* International revenue */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue worldwide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_streams" (
  "revenue_stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue stream */,
  "revenue_stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the revenue stream */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revenue stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_and_crew" (
  "cast_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast/crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person in the movie (e.g., actor, director) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_and_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_and_crew_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the person */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_studios" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the studio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "studio_id")
)
